nasb.text: But he became hungry and was desiring to eat; but while they were making preparations, he fell into a trance;

esv.text: And he became hungry and wanted something to eat, but while they were preparing it, he fell into a trance

cnv.text: 那家人正在預備飯的時候，彼得覺得餓了，很想吃飯。這時候他魂遊象外，

ccb.text: 他觉得肚子饿了，想吃东西。那家人正在预备午饭的时候，彼得进入异象，

csbs.text: 他感到饿了，想吃东西。有人正在给他准备的时候，彼得魂游象外，
